title: Redirection & Pipe (Windows)
description: Teknik redirect output, input, dan pipe untuk menghubungkan perintah di CMD dan PowerShell.

commands.name: redirect-cmd
commands.title: > dan >> — Redirect Output (CMD)
commands.description: Mengalihkan output ke file di CMD. > menimpa, >> menambahkan.
commands.examples:
# Simpan output ke file
dir > daftar.txt

# Append ke file
echo Baris baru >> log.txt

# Redirect error
command 2> errors.txt

# Redirect semua output
command > output.txt 2>&1

# Buang output
command > NUL 2>&1

# Buang error saja
dir /s 2> NUL

commands.name: pipe-cmd
commands.title: | — Pipe (CMD & PowerShell)
commands.description: Menghubungkan output dari satu perintah ke input perintah berikutnya.
commands.examples:
# Filter output
dir | find ".txt"
tasklist | findstr "chrome"

# Urutkan
dir /b | sort

# Tampilkan per halaman
dir /s | more

# Salin ke clipboard
dir | clip
ipconfig | clip

# Pipeline bertingkat
dir /s /b | findstr ".log" | sort
tasklist | findstr /i "chrome" | find /c /v ""

commands.name: redirect-ps
commands.title: PowerShell Redirection & Pipeline
commands.description: PowerShell memiliki pipeline yang jauh lebih powerful karena mengirim objek, bukan teks.

options.description: Redirect ke file dengan opsi encoding

commands.examples:
# Simpan ke file
Get-Process > proses.txt
Get-Process | Out-File proses.txt -Encoding UTF8

# Tee (tampilkan + simpan)
Get-Process | Tee-Object -FilePath proses.txt

# Ekspor ke CSV
Get-Process | Export-Csv proses.csv -NoTypeInformation

# Konversi ke JSON
Get-Process | Select Name, CPU | ConvertTo-Json > proses.json

# Pipeline objek
Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.CPU -gt 10} | Sort-Object CPU -Descending
Get-Service | Where-Object {$_.Status -eq 'Running'} | Select-Object Name, DisplayName

# ForEach pipeline
Get-ChildItem *.txt | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Name $_.Length }
commands.notes: Pipeline PowerShell mengirim objek .NET, bukan teks. Ini membuatnya jauh lebih powerful dibanding pipe CMD.

commands.name: clip
commands.title: clip — Salin ke Clipboard
commands.description: Menyalin output perintah langsung ke clipboard Windows.
commands.examples:
# Salin output dir
dir | clip

# Salin isi file
type file.txt | clip

# Salin IP address
ipconfig | findstr "IPv4" | clip

# PowerShell: Set-Clipboard
Get-Process | Set-Clipboard
"Hello" | Set-Clipboard
Get-Clipboard
